name: openapi-extract
description: Adds an OpenAPI mini-spec extraction skill for AI agents and Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Extract small OpenAPI specs for AI agents.
interface.longDescription: Use openapi-extract to list OpenAPI operations and extract compact mini specs for selected endpoints without loading a full OpenAPI document into context.
defaultPrompt: List operation ids from this OpenAPI file.
Extract a mini spec for this endpoint.
